untranslatable_reason: Signal requires external interest rate differential data (3-month rates of multiple countries vs. U.S. rate) which is not available in the allowed indicator set. The backtest engine has no access to macroeconomic interest rate data, only price-based technical indicators. This is a macro carry trade strategy that cannot be expressed using only price, volume, and technical indicators.
translation_notes: KAUFMAN_DRY_13 is a fundamental macro strategy based on interest rate differentials, not a technical trading signal. It requires: (1) real-time 3-month interest rate data for multiple currency pairs, (2) comparison logic against USD rates, (3) monthly rebalancing based on rate changes. None of these can be expressed with the available technical indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, MACD, etc.). To implement this strategy, the backtest engine would need access to an interest_rate_differential indicator or similar macro data source.
